headline: Can Ralph Lauren's Store Expansion Boost Brand Value & Sales?
summary: RL's aggressive store expansion in top global cities aims to boost brand equity, margins and full-price sales. Can it sustain the luxury momentum?

headline: The Children’s Place expands sourcing chief’s remit in turnaround push
summary: The Children’s Place has made a number of executive appointments and organisation changes including expanding the SVP and head of sourcing role to accelerate its company- wide transformation.
